title: Orange Tree Toys Shark Abacus Counting Toy - Animal Learning Toys - Wooden Stacking Toys for 1 Year Olds - Toddler Early Development & Activity Toys - Early Development & Activity Toys
features: PROMOTES DEVELOPMENT: This charming traditional toy will help your child learn to count whilst developing fine motor skills such as concentration and hand-eye coordination. Learn to count with this playful shark character! Counting toys for 1 year olds create a colourful and stimulating environment while providing hours of fun!

SAFE FOR PLAY: Painted in beautiful bright colours with non toxic paint, this product is made of smooth pieces with no corners or sharp edges for your little one. All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. Suitable from age 12 months, they make great toys for 1+ year old boys and girl

DEVELOP KEY MOTOR SKILLS: Make learning fun with this playful children's counting toy. This cute wooden toy will introduce the concept of counting whilst teaching your child simple addition and subtraction. Counting games help to develop key motor skills, including hand-eye coordination and concentration

TRUSTED MANUFACTURER: Designed in the UK by Orange Tree Toys, in their headquarters in the Cotswold countryside. Orange Tree toys are environmentally friendly; made from sustainable wood and 100% recyclable packaging. Wooden toys are durable and long lasting; providing hours of fun and play value for children, they can be passed down the generations!

PERFECT GIFT: This brightly coloured shark counting game is is the perfect learning toy for kids. Wooden counting toys are ideal 1st birthday gifts for girls and boys, Christmas presents, Christening gifts or for another special occasion
description: From the manufacturer Traditional Wooden Toys Our beautiful wooden toys are all lovingly designed in the UK. Our toys are designed for maximum fun and safety, proving a range a beautifully crafted traditional children's toys which last for years are are sure to become toy box treasures. Offically Licensed We are proud to hold the license for some truly tradition childhood favourite! We offer a beautiful range of products in our sea life range. Designed for Maximum Fun & safety All Orange Tree toys are tested both in-house during production and independently to meet European safety standards. All of our toys are painted using non-toxic paint.
